label: capability search • workflow • abstain on chit-chat
notes: Symmetric with `capability_search.abstain-greeting` on the tools lane. RRF saturation (max ≈ 0.0328 with k=60) caps the abstain-vs-recall gap to ~0.001 — workflows/skills face the same ceiling under RRF. If this case fails after PR-B lands, the right fix is the abstain quality floor workstream (pre-RRF gate / query-intent classifier), NOT threshold tuning. Track here as `expect maxAccepted=0` so the recall_floors gate can adopt the same known-tracking pattern.
